$comment: Normative IntentProof source tree: https://github.com/IntentProof/intentproof-spec/tree/main/schema — $id is a logical URI; see README.
title: IntentProof Runtime Config v1

version.description: Config document version; MUST be 1 for this schema.

defaultWrapOptions.description: Process-wide defaults merged under per-wrap options.

exporters.description: Ordered list of exporter identifiers or inline hooks (SDK-defined encoding).

type.description: Exporter kind; custom MUST include implementation-specific fields.

endpoint.description: Required for http exporters when used.

headers.description: Optional HTTP headers for http exporters.

failOpen.description: When true, exporter failures MUST NOT change user-visible outcomes.

headerName.description: HTTP header used for inbound correlation extraction when applicable.

generateOnMissing.description: When true, SDK generates a UUID when no correlation is active.

maxDepth.description: Maximum object graph depth for input/output capture.

maxStringLength.description: Maximum serialized string length for any single field.

redactKeys.description: Case-insensitive key names to replace with [REDACTED] in captured objects.
